app_context.name: Broad — The Rider's Companion
app_context.domain: Motorcycle rider companion app (India, group riders, weekend warriors, touring clubs)
app_context.archetype: Hybrid: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy / Analog Print) for standard app flows + Archetype 4 (Swiss / Instrument Panel) for Dark Mode (Live Ride/SOS)
aesthetic_guidelines: Unusual restraint: quiet, considered, analog, minimalist.
Inspired by print logic, instrument panels, Scandinavian industrial design, field journals.
NO gamer/MotoGP aesthetic. NO drop-shadow heavy cards. NO tyre-tread borders.
NO heavy rounded corners (use tiny radius only).

rules: Print-editorial grid: Eyebrow / Headline / Deck / Body / Rule.
Use explicit 1px borders instead of drop shadows for visual hierarchy.
Use horizontal rules (1px borders) to separate list items (Spec Rows).

motion_system.philosophy: Still, not busy. Animations carry meaning.

1_splash_auth.layout: Minimalist center-aligned brand mark, email/password standard inputs with thin borders. Onboarding uses large Fraunces typography, quiet aesthetic.

2_home_dashboard.layout: Eyebrow greeting (JetBrains Mono), H1 name. Quick actions (Plan/Find) in stark minimal boxes. Upcoming trips list separated by fine rules. If trip active, show dark mode card as entry point.

3_trip_planner.layout: Map-centric top half, bottom sheet for plotting route. Input fields for waypoints. Metadata (distance/elevation) in JetBrains Mono.

4_trip_details.layout: Pre-ride briefing. Editorial print layout: Route stats, crew list with tiny avatars, packing notes. Large Primary CTA 'START TRIP' anchored at bottom.

5_live_ride.layout: Instrument-panel feel. Dark map, massive Fraunces speedometer. Rider stats (distance, time) in JetBrains Mono. Prominent red/amber SOS button (long-press). Total dark immersion.

6_sos_active.layout: Critical alert. Deep obsidian background. Blinking or solid red accent. Broadcast confirmation text, coordinates in JetBrains. 'I AM SAFE' cancel button (long-press) at bottom.

7_convoy_list.layout: Simple spec row list. Name in Fraunces, health/position in JetBrains Mono. Minimalist dot indicators for connection status.

8_trips_archive.layout: Top tabs (Active / Upcoming / Past) underlined. List of past trips formatted like journal entries. High contrast, ink on paper.

9_discover.layout: Public rides feed. Large imagery, minimal text overlays. Standard padding, editorial cards.

10_profile.layout: Stats grid (total km, trips, alt) using monospace numbers. Bike details in spec rows. Emergency contacts listed cleanly with horizontal rules.

11_trip_complete.layout: Safely home summary. Large Fraunces headline 'RIDE COMPLETE'. Statistics breakdown like a printed receipt or journal log.

12_convoy_chat.layout: Extremely minimal in-ride comms. No chat bubbles, just raw text streams separated by lines. Metadata timestamp for each message.

13_settings.layout: Standard list view with toggle components (pill-shaped, tiny radius). Minimalist.

hero_himalayan_road.description: Man sitting by motorcycle overlooking lush green mountains
hero_himalayan_road.usage: Discover feed placeholder or Trip Complete background

hero_group_ride.description: Group of motorcyclists riding on a mountain road
hero_group_ride.usage: Trip Details hero image or Welcome screen

texture_analog.description: Motorcycle parked on a road surrounded by greenery

tech_stack.styling: StyleSheet / React Native View Styles (No Tailwind)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast_ratio: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text against Paper/Obsidian backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g. data-testid='sos-activate-button', data-testid='plan-trip-card').
